text:
Loberry (ロベリー, Roberī) is a maid for 10 th Prince Kacho and one of her allotted fifteen employees aboard the Black Whale during its voyage to the Dark Continent. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 366 

Appearance

Loberry dresses in a standard maid's robe. 

Personality

Despite being a servant of Prince Kacho, she does not view Kacho favorably, believing that she does not have a good personality, and considering herself lucky when she gets a break from tending to her while representing Kacho elsewhere. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 369 She appears to be relatively easily frightened; upon seeing Silent Majority, she initially remains only unsettled, but begins panicking out loud after beginning to realize that no one else could see it. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 370 

Plot

Succession Contest arc

On the first day of the voyage, Loberry and her fellow employees of Prince Kacho witness Kacho's tantrum at the meal prepared for her, her first of the voyage, knocking the meal off the table and breaking the tableware. Melody overhears their whispered disgruntlement at Kacho's outburst, hearing them wish that they had been assigned to 11 th Prince Fugetsu Hui Guo Rou instead amongst other comments. 

Later that day, Kacho is contacted by Room 1014 and agrees to send representatives to learn Nen under Kurapika. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 368 At 9:00 a.m. the next day, Loberry and her fellow servant Yuri turn up at Room 1014 to represent Kacho, relieved at their fortune in being given the chance to momentarily escape her. While waiting for the teaching to begin, the two maids talk with Ladiolus and Illardia, servant representatives of Prince Fugetsu. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 369 

Right as classes begin, a voice activates their ability and reveals in a monologue that only they and Loberry, who had unknowingly been possessed by them, could see the doll generated by their ability. Kurapika asks the participants if any of them can already use Nen, and Loberry looks around to see two people raise their hands, wondering why they would attend the teaching if they could already use Nen. As Loberry looks around, she notices the doll, and begins feeling unsettled by it. Furykov, a representative of 1 st Prince Benjamin, notices that four others, including Loberry, had a flow of aura that indicated knowledge of Nen to him, but says nothing. As he looks at Loberry, he notices her unsettlement but sees nothing in the direction her gaze is focused, and wonders what the matter with her is. Loberry asks Yuri if she could see the doll, but none of the people around her say they can, and Loberry begins to raise her voice in fear. As Loberry points in the direction of the doll, the ability user moves. It attacks Barrigen, a bodyguard of 13 th Prince Marayam, having waited for Loberry to cause a distraction in fear. Barrigen is killed, and as the commotion subsides, Loberry notices the doll had disappeared after Yuri asks her where it is. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 35, Chapter 370 

Loberry is soon restrained by Hashito and Sakata, bodyguards of 3 rd Prince Zhang Lei. They contact the Justice Department to report and request that Loberry be arrested for the murder of Barrigen, but their request is denied due to circumstantial evidence. Instead, Queen Seiko is placed under monitoring for the next 72 hours. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 371 Later, Furykov's train of thought reveals that Loberry had been taken into custody by the royal army. Hunter × Hunter - Volume 36, Chapter 372 

Abilities & Powers

Nen

Furykov identified Loberry as someone who has awakened her Nen abilities, which he speculated was due to her having been the host of Silent Majority. However, since she never mentioned seeing other people's aura (or her own), it appears highly likely she only "half awakened", a state common among victims of Manipulation or targets of parasitic-type Nen abilities.
